blocking_findings.claim: Grid-intersection self-consistency check uses a hard 1e-6 tolerance on fld_cos/fld_l2 between fixed_w4_pos2 and fixed_b8_w4 (identical design point b=8,t=12), and raises RuntimeError if exceeded.
blocking_findings.evidence: run_phase_a does not set torch.use_deterministic_algorithms(True) nor torch.backends.cudnn.deterministic=True. Qwen2.5 uses flash-attention2 which is not bitwise reproducible across separate calls on GPU. The two conditions run in different loop iterations separated by gc.collect() and cuda.empty_cache(), altering memory layout and potentially triggering different kernel paths. On GPU hardware the check will spuriously fire and abort an otherwise valid 6-GPU-hour full run with no recovery path other than a code edit.
blocking_findings.suggested_fix: Option A (preferred): Compare accuracy and degradation at strict equality (they are counts-based and fully deterministic under greedy decoding), and compare fld_cos/fld_l2 at a relaxed tolerance of 1e-3 OR convert them to log-only warnings. Option B: Force deterministic mode at run start (torch.use_deterministic_algorithms(True), torch.backends.cudnn.deterministic=True, env CUBLAS_WORKSPACE_CONFIG=:4096:8). Option A is preferred because it does not impose a global deterministic-mode constraint that can slow down flash-attention2.

non_blocking_findings.note: A10 grep scope: current code checks only phase_a_summary.txt/.json; spec mentions 'any .md artifact the writer produces' but no .md is written in run_dir. Theoretical gap only.
revision='main' resolves to rolling HEAD at download time; manifest does not capture the resolved HF commit SHA. Already known, deferred to pre-full-run gate.
Confirms CR-01: `or 0` bootstrap seed fallback is dead code.

compute_fld uses sorted(set(hs_recipient) & set(hs_composed)) — if run_inference silently drops samples asymmetrically across conditions, FLD diverges from accuracy sample set without warning. Pre-existing run_inference interface limitation, not a Phase A regression.

all_attack_vectors_pass: AV-2 spearman n=4 ties (widths distinct by construction)
AV-3 FLD float32 cast on both tensors
AV-5 self-consistency check skipped correctly in sanity mode
AV-6 random_donor_seeds dict keyed by condition name preserves collision
AV-7 git SHA works in detached HEAD / shallow clone
AV-9 no MGSM-zh split leakage via cached parser state
AV-12 zip truncation cannot occur (lists always len(samples))
AV-14 A3 sanity CSV row count = 1 correct
AV-15 scipy spearmanr attribute fallback correct
AV-16 grid1/grid2 row filtering at intersection correct
routing: Per CLAUDE.md: Codex agree-block always wins. Pipeline halts. Route AV-4 back to writer for r3. No other findings require code changes.
